title: Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle Proposal - Week Of 2026-01-19
post1Raw:
On behalf of @atlas-axis, we are submitting the Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle proposal below.

* * *

This proposal includes the following edits:

- **Authorize Transfer To Grove Labs** - Authorizes the transfer of GROVE tokens to Grove Labs.
- **Update The Atlas To Introduce Skybase** - Updates references from Launch Agent 3 to Skybase and adds a new Ecosystem Accord between Sky and Skybase.
- **Update Grove Artifact** - Adds new deployments and updates to the Grove Artifact.
- **Remove Atlas Core Development Payments** - Removes Atlas Core Development payments, which have been replaced by the Treasury Management Function.
- **Clean Up Supporting Documents** - Makes a copy of each Supporting Document so that each copy targets exactly one Primary Document in preparation for future upgrades to the Atlas.

### Authorize Transfer To Grove Labs

- **Replace** `A.2.9.2.2.2.1.2.1 - Grove Prime Treasury` to read as follows:
    - **Grove Prime Treasury** *(Core)* - 3,000,000,000 GROVE tokens are allocated to the Grove Foundation, with an option to further increase this allocation by 5% (500,000,000 tokens). The additional 5% will be distributed to relevant stakeholders / users from SkyŌĆÖs allocation of GROVE tokens, but that distribution will happen from the Grove Foundation. This distribution plan must be approved by Sky before the transfer.
- **Replace** `A.2.9.2.2.2.1.3 - Transfer Limit` to read as follows:
    - **Transfer Limit** *(Core)* - Transfer limits for Spark and Grove are specified in the subdocuments herein.
        - **Spark Transfer Limit** *(Core)* - A maximum of 1,000,000,000 tokens can be transferred by Spark to the Spark Foundation in the first year for the purpose of rewarding contributors, and 500,000,000 tokens per year thereafter for the purpose of rewarding contributors.
        - **Grove Transfer Limit** *(Core)* - Grove may transfer its contributor allocation, in whole or in part, to its operating entities, foundations, or affiliated entities in advance of contributor distribution. Tokens allocated for contributor compensation may be granted to contributors upfront, subject to vesting, forfeiture, and clawback arrangements that are consistent with the vesting schedules and distribution parameters set forth in this Atlas.
            
            A maximum of 1,000,000,000 tokens for Grove may vest or otherwise be released into circulation for contributor compensation purposes in the first year, and a maximum of 500,000,000 tokens per year for Grove may vest or otherwise be released into circulation thereafter. Tokens that are unvested or subject to forfeiture shall not be considered distributed, released, or in circulation.
            
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.1.4.2.1.1.4 - Token Address` to read as follows:
    - **Token Address** *(Core)* - The address of GROVE on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0xB30FE1Cf884B48a22a50D22a9282004F2c5E9406`.
        
        
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.1.4.2.1.1.5 - Token Admin` to read as follows:
    - **Token Admin** *(Core)* - The Token Admin is GroveŌĆÖs SubProxy.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.1.4.2.1.2 - Operational Process Definition` to read as follows:
    - **Operational Process Definition** *(Core)* - The documents herein define the operational processes for minting and initial distribution of the tokens from the Genesis Supply.
        - **Minting Of Tokens To Grove Foundation** *(Core)* - The Genesis Supply was minted to an account owned by the Grove Foundation. The address of the account on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0x22F443740Aa13e9d9A1Fb3dadfbEAfd3d43099fF`.
        - **Transfer Of Tokens To Sky** *(Core)* - The Grove Foundation transferred 7 billion GROVE tokens from the Grove Foundation account, specified in Minting Of Tokens To Grove Foundation, to the Sky Pause Proxy.
        - **Transfer Of Tokens To Grove** *(Core)* - The Grove Foundation transferred 3 billion GROVE tokens from the Grove Foundation account, specified in Minting Of Tokens To Grove Foundation, to the Grove SubProxy.
        - **Transfer Of Tokens To Grove Labs** *(Core)* - Grove will transfer 2.5 billion GROVE tokens from the Grove SubProxy to Grove Labs. The address of Grove Labs on the Ethereum Mainnet is `0x1EBC4425B16FD76F01f9260d8bfFE0c2C6ecCe70`.

### Update The Atlas To Introduce Skybase

- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.2.9.2 - Active Ecosystem Accords`. These documents should be located directly after `A.2.9.2.6 - Ecosystem Accord 6: Sky And Launch Agent 6` and its subdocuments to read as follows:
    - **Ecosystem Accord 7: Sky and Skybase** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein record the terms of agreement between Sky and Skybase as agreed in Ecosystem Accord 7.
        - **Accord Key Details** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the key details of Ecosystem Accord 7, such as parties to the agreement and the duration of the Accord.
            - **Parties To The Accord** *(Core)* - The parties to Ecosystem Accord 7 are Sky and Skybase, as defined in the subdocuments herein.
                - **Sky Details** *(Core)* - The party ŌĆśSkyŌĆÖ comprises Sky Core.
                - **Skybase Prime Details** *(Core)* - The party ŌĆśSkybaseŌĆÖ comprises the Skybase Prime Agent, Skybase Foundation, and Development Company.
            - **Duration Of The Accord** *(Core)* - The duration of Ecosystem Accord 7 is indefinite, commencing from September 1, 2024.
        - **Accord Substantive Terms** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 7. Additional detail regarding the substantive terms of Ecosystem Accord 7 will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas, as agreed by the Parties to the Accord.
            - **Tokenomics** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out agreed terms with respect to tokenomics.
                - **Total Token Supply** *(Core)* - The total token supply of SKYBASE will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.
                - **Token Allocations** *(Core)* - Specific token allocations are defined in the subdocuments herein.
                    - **Skybase Prime Treasury** *(Core)* - The amount of SKYBASE tokens allocated to the Skybase Prime Treasury (SkybaseŌĆÖs SubProxy) will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.
                    - **Sky Retained Tokens And Reward Pools** *(Core)* - The amount of SKYBASE tokens retained by Sky and their distribution will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.
            - **Genesis Capital Allocation** *(Core)* - The subdocuments herein set out agreed terms with respect to Genesis Capital Allocation.
                - **Skybase Initial Allocation** *(Core)* - The Initial Allocation for Skybase is 15,000,000 USDS.
                - **Initial Allocation Distribution** *(Core)* - 10,000,000 USDS of the Initial Allocation is distributed to the Skybase SubProxy.
                    
                    5,000,000 USDS of the Initial Allocation is distributed to the USDS Demand Subsidies Multisig.
                    
                    - **Transfer Of Genesis Capital Allocation To Skybase SubProxy** *(Core)* - The transfer of 10,000,000 USDS from the Surplus Buffer to the Skybase SubProxy for the Genesis Capital Allocation will be included in the January 29, 2026 Executive Vote.
                        
                        This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
                        
- **Replace** `A.3.7.1.5.5 - Genesis Agents` to read as follows:
    - **Genesis Agents** *(Core)* - Genesis Agents are Agents that receive capital contributions from Sky, including, without limitation:
        - Spark
        - Grove
        - Keel
        - Skybase
        - Obex
        - Core Council Executor Agent 1
- **Replace** `A.3.7.1.5.6.1 - Amount Of Capital Contributed By Sky To Agents` to read as follows:
    - **Amount Of Capital Contributed By Sky To Agents** *(Core)* - The amount of capital contributed by Sky to Agents is:
        - Spark - 25,000,000 USDS
        - Obex - 21,000,000 USDS
        - Skybase - 15,000,000 USDS
        - Core Council Executor Agent 1 - 25,000,000 USDS
- **Update** references to Launch Agent 3 and minor related edits as specified in the linked Pull Request: https://github.com/sky-ecosystem/next-gen-atlas/pull/158

### Update Grove Artifact

- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.1.2.1.6 - Curve`. These documents should be located directly after `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.1.2.1.6.2 - Ethereum Mainnet - Curve RLUSD/USDC Pool LP Deposits Instance Configuration Document Location` to read as follows:
